{{Expand}}

{{Infobox starship
| name = Universal Manufacturing secure cargo transport ship
| introduced = lh-04-the-pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Universal Manufacturing secure cargo transport ship]] contains a [[vault]] with an AI monitoring its security cameras.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c24">''The Pilot'', chapter 24</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
